name: Go/No-Go Decision
when_to_use: Emit an explicit go / no-go / pivot recommendation with named kill criteria from the F/A/D/R fold.

name: Kill-Criteria Authoring
when_to_use: Author forward-commitment kill criteria — the conditions under which we will stop, without re-litigating.

name: Pivot Decision
when_to_use: Convert investigation findings into a specific pivot proposal: what changes, what is kept, what test closes the new top assumption.
